requirement_topic.en: SEEG Grid Connection — 220/380 V, 50 Hz and Site Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: SEEG并网接入——220/380 V、50 Hz及站点验收
requirement_topic.zht: SEEG併網接入——220/380 V、50 Hz及站點驗收

summary.en: Gabon electricity supply is commonly referenced as 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. SEEG (Société d'Énergie et d'Eau du Gabon) provides public electricity service across Gabon, while ARSEE is the sector regulator for water and electric energy. EV charging projects should be treated as grid-connected electrical installations requiring site-level coordination with SEEG for available capacity, metering, protection, earthing, power quality, commissioning, and any distribution-network reinforcement. A Gabon EVSE-specific grid code or public charger technical specification could not be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14.
summary.zh: 加蓬电力供应通常按220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz理解。SEEG（加蓬能源与水务公司）在加蓬全国提供公共电力服务，ARSEE是水务和电能行业监管机构。电动汽车充电项目应作为并网电气安装处理，需要就可用容量、计量、保护、接地、电能质量、调试以及任何配电网加固与SEEG进行站点级协调。截至2026年6月14日，未能从公开官方来源确认加蓬已发布EVSE专项并网规范或公共充电桩技术规范。
summary.zht: 加彭電力供應通常按220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz理解。SEEG（加彭能源與水務公司）在加彭全國提供公共電力服務，ARSEE是水務和電能行業監管機構。電動汽車充電項目應作為併網電氣安裝處理，需要就可用容量、計量、保護、接地、電能質量、調試以及任何配電網加固與SEEG進行站點級協調。截至2026年6月14日，未能從公開官方來源確認加彭已發布EVSE專項併網規範或公共充電樁技術規範。

standards_or_laws: SEEG — public electricity service in Gabon
ARSEE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Eau potable et de l'Énergie Électrique
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Site-specific SEEG connection and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China's domestic supply is also 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, but matching nominal voltage does not prove Gabon grid readiness because site capacity, voltage fluctuation, earthing, protection coordination, humidity exposure, and commissioning requirements differ.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电同样为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，但标称电压相同并不证明已满足加蓬电网要求，因为站点容量、电压波动、接地、保护配合、高湿暴露和调试要求均可能不同。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電同樣為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，但標稱電壓相同並不證明已滿足加彭電網要求，因為站點容量、電壓波動、接地、保護配合、高濕暴露和調試要求均可能不同。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger input range covers 220/380 V, 50 Hz with realistic Gabon voltage variation; (2) SEEG has sufficient feeder and transformer capacity at the site; (3) protection, RCD/RCM, earthing, surge protection, and metering are accepted by the local engineer and utility; (4) harmonic and EMC data are available under IEC 61000; (5) equipment is derated for Gabon's hot, humid, coastal or equatorial operating environment. China domestic grid evidence is not a SEEG acceptance substitute.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入范围覆盖220/380 V、50 Hz及加蓬实际电压波动；(2) SEEG在站点馈线和变压器容量方面具备接入条件；(3) 保护、RCD/RCM、接地、防雷浪涌和计量方案获得当地工程师和电力公司认可；(4) 具备IEC 61000体系的谐波和EMC数据；(5) 设备已针对加蓬炎热、高湿、沿海或赤道运行环境进行降额。中国国内并网证据不能替代SEEG验收。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入範圍覆蓋220/380 V、50 Hz及加彭實際電壓波動；(2) SEEG在站點饋線和變壓器容量方面具備接入條件；(3) 保護、RCD/RCM、接地、防雷浪湧和計量方案獲得當地工程師和電力公司認可；(4) 具備IEC 61000體系的諧波和EMC數據；(5) 設備已針對加彭炎熱、高濕、沿海或赤道運行環境進行降額。中國國內併網證據不能替代SEEG驗收。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project level — any grid-connected EVSE should be coordinated with SEEG and compliant with ARSEE-regulated electricity-sector requirements; EVSE-specific public charger grid rules could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a SEEG or ARSEE approval substitute

source.publisher: SEEG — Société d'Énergie et d'Eau du Gabon

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nominal voltage similarity does not make a China-market charger Gabon grid-ready. Prepare SEEG site documentation, IEC 61000 power-quality data, protection and earthing evidence, and humidity/thermal derating before committing to installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 标称电压相近并不意味着中国市场充电桩已满足加蓬并网要求。承诺安装前，应准备SEEG站点文件、IEC 61000电能质量数据、保护和接地证据，以及高湿/热降额资料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 標稱電壓相近並不意味著中國市場充電樁已滿足加彭併網要求。承諾安裝前，應準備SEEG站點文件、IEC 61000電能質量數據、保護和接地證據，以及高濕/熱降額資料。
